title: limniris ruthenica
intro: Limniris ruthenica, also known as Iris ruthenica, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant is a type of rhizomatous perennial that is native to eastern Europe and western Asia, characterized by its blue-purple flowers and sword-shaped leaves. The medicinal properties of Limniris ruthenica include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and fighting off infections, and it is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves.
